name: Delavan Collection Metal Wire Fruit Basket Gold - Threshold™: Iron Round Fruit Holder Kitchen, 15.75" Height
description:
Store seasonal fruits and vegetables with this Delavan Collection Metal Wire Fruit Basket from Threshold™. This fruit basket makes a great addition to your kitchen island, pantry or dining table. Featuring a two-tiered design, this multifunctional basket has more capacity to store a variety of fruits and vegetables. The gold-tone metal wire construction gives it an eye-catching and airy look. Plus, it comes with a top loop handle for easy carrying.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
